hero.imageAlt: Exterior view of the two-story Garden Villa at dusk, featuring a lower-level porch with seating, an upper balcony with dark wood accents, and lush tropical gardens with red flowers
hero.title: Garden Villa

intro.heading: Grounded in the soil, open to the breeze.
paragraphs: The Garden Villa is a sensory dialogue between architecture and the earth. Accessible via a private botanical path lined with indigenous ferns and wild orchids, the space is designed to dissolve the boundaries between shelter and sanctuary.
Every element—from the reclaimed teak floors to the volcanic stone textures—invites you to slow your pulse to the rhythm of the jungle. It is not just a stay; it is a deep rejuvenation.

sideImage.alt: Rectangular pool framed by palm fronds in a lush tropical garden, with a lounge chair on the deck

quoteCard.label: The Arrival
quoteCard.quote: The scent of wet earth and jasmine greets you before you even turn the key.

items.title: Private Stone Bath
items.description: Hand-carved from a single block of volcanic basalt, positioned for starlit soaking.
items.imageAlt: Minimalist luxury bathroom with carved stone bathtub and tropical greenery

items.title: Open-Air Rain Shower
items.description: Experience the monsoon flow beneath a canopy of bamboo and wild ginger.
items.imageAlt: Outdoor rain shower with copper fittings among bamboo and tropical plants

items.title: Rainforest Terrace
items.description: A cantilevered teak deck providing a front-row seat to the jungle's dawn chorus.
items.imageAlt: Wooden terrace with daybed overlooking a rainforest valley

wide.alt: Bedroom with textured sand-toned walls, woven pendant lamps, striped linen pillows, and tropical greenery through the window

tall.alt: Tropical palm leaf with dew in macro

accent.alt: Grey river stones stacked on wood with soft shadows

visualGallery.materialsBody: Mango Valley is curated with honest materials. We use locally sourced woods and stones that age gracefully, developing a patina that tells the story of the seasons.

botanical.imageAlt: Horticulturist caring for rare tropical plants in a greenhouse
botanical.title: Nature Concierge

items.title: Indigenous Flora
items.descriptionHtml: Discover the Heliconia Rostrata and Cattleya Dowiana growing right outside your window. Our guides offer private botanical walks.

items.title: Herb Garden Access
items.descriptionHtml: Pick fresh mint, ginger, and lemongrass for your evening tea from the villa's private kitchen garden.

booking.title: Reserve the Garden Villa
booking.description: Reconnect with the rhythm of nature. Our concierge is ready to tailor your journey from the moment of inquiry.
